programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered
programme.desc: A letter from beyond the grave brings new hope and life to an estranged family.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered
programme.desc: The postal detectives are faced with a challenge when a letter from the futures turns up.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered: Truth Be Told
programme.desc: The Postables (Eric Mabius, Kristin Booth, Crystal Lowe) embark on a mission to deliver a soldier's letter from Afghanistan to a bullied teen, while Oliver's estranged father surprises him with news that shakes him to the core.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mystery: The Deadly Room
programme.desc: Jennifer Shannon must use her intuitive skills to investigate her friend's death in a multimillion-dollar home with a dark history.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Taking a Shot at Love
programme.desc: Sparks fly between a ballet instructor and a professional hockey player as she tries to help him recover from the same injury that sidelined her dancing career.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: New evidence comes to light that shifts the fire investigation; Elizabeth and her classroom start a project that can impact the territory for generations to come.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: A familiar face returns and brings a fun, new piece of technology with her, the polygraph; Nathan freezes when a playful line of questioning catches him off guard.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Love, Again
programme.desc: A couple on the verge of a divorce must put aside their differences while planning their daughter's wedding, only to find that their own marriage may be worth saving after all.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Garage Sale Mystery: The Deadly Room
programme.desc: Jennifer Shannon must use her intuitive skills to investigate her friend's death in a multimillion-dollar home with a dark history.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Loving Every Minute
programme.desc: When Stephanie inherits a watch, she learns that it allows her to travel back in time five minutes one time each day. As she uses it more and more, her life and romance with her co-worker Hunter don't shake out the way she had hoped.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: New evidence comes to light that shifts the fire investigation; Elizabeth and her classroom start a project that can impact the territory for generations to come.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Amy and Ty try to find out why Caleb's horse is ill.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: While the family looks for Georgie, she questions her decision to run away.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When Ty helps Jack and Tim on a cattle drive, an accident jeopardizes their plans.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Tim asks Amy and Georgie for help to discourage Jade from accepting a suspicious sponsorship deal.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Return to Sender
programme.desc: Meg moves into her new apartment to study, but finds a love letter marked return to sender. Determined to help reunite the lost lovers she teams up with apartment manager Oliver and a pair of podcasters to try and track them down.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered
programme.desc: The postal detectives discover a special package of music.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered
programme.desc: Justice comes in the form of a letter as the team solve clues to deliver not only a letter, but an unspeakable truth that has been buried for years.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered: The Impossible Dream
programme.desc: The Postables (Eric Mabius, Kristin Booth) race against time to reunite a soldier in Afghanistan with her family.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: When Ty helps Jack and Tim on a cattle drive, an accident jeopardizes their plans.

programme.desc: Tim asks Amy and Georgie for help to discourage Jade from accepting a suspicious sponsorship deal.

programme.desc: Justice comes in the form of a letter as the team solve clues to deliver not only a letter, but an unspeakable truth that has been buried for years.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered: The Impossible Dream
programme.desc: The Postables (Eric Mabius, Kristin Booth) race against time to reunite a soldier in Afghanistan with her family.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mystery: The Wedding Dress
programme.desc: Sleuth Jennifer Shannon (Lori Loughlin) and Detective Lynwood (Barclay Hope) investigate a decades-old case involving the disappearance of a groom.

rating.system: Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Love at the Bootcamp
programme.desc: A scattered marketing executive is tasked with helping an unpopular small-town bootcamp turn its image around. She finds that the strict, regimented ways of its owner might just be the perfect 'fit' for love.

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: A business proposition brings folks together as they help Minnie out of a jam; Nathan's fire investigation puts him in harm's way; stars Erin Krakow, Kevin McGarry, Pascale Hutton, Jack Wagner.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: When Calls the Heart
programme.desc: Feeling the loss of her playhouse, Rosemary directs a silent film and gets the whole community involved; Lucas finds himself hesitant to open his heart again.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Ainsley McGregor Mysteries: A Case for the Winemaker
programme.desc: Former criminologist Ainsley McGregor returns to her hometown of Sweet River, Texas, to open a market for artisans to sell crafts and wares. However, when her friend is accused of murder, McGregor finds herself returning to her crime-solving ways.

programme.title: Garage Sale Mystery: The Wedding Dress
programme.desc: Sleuth Jennifer Shannon (Lori Loughlin) and Detective Lynwood (Barclay Hope) investigate a decades-old case involving the disappearance of a groom.

programme.desc: Amy and Cass try to save a racehorse with a career-ending condition; when Tim's ex-girlfriend arrives, he sees his new relationship differently.

programme.title: Heartland
programme.desc: Georgie is inspired by her school project to take a risk with Adam.

programme.title: Strike of Love
programme.desc: Struggling real estate agent Mandy discovers her true passion and love, when she inherits her grandfather's bowling alley, teams up with a local vet, and finds a lost kitten along the way.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered
programme.desc: The Postables discover a box of treasure.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered
programme.desc: As Oliver, Shane, Rita and Norman search for clues to bring a family together, Norman is having a family reunion of his own with an amazing grandmother he never knew he had.

programme.title: Signed, Sealed, Delivered: From the Heart
programme.desc: Oliver (Eric Mabius), Shane (Kristin Booth), Rita (Crystal Lowe) and Norman (Geoff Gustafson) face personal challenges following Valentine's Day.
